paper_title: Bag of Dims: Training-Free Mechanistic Interpretability via Dimension-Level Sign Patterns

research_directions.direction: Per-dim sign catalog at scale (70B+ models)
research_directions.rationale: Need to verify structure persists at larger scales

research_directions.direction: Induction primitive: from sign-suppress to sign-induce
research_directions.rationale: Only suppression works; induction would enable feature injection

research_directions.direction: Real-time safety monitoring via per-dim sign tracking
research_directions.rationale: Low-cost feature reading enables practical deployment monitoring
Whether structure is unique to transformers is unknown
Cheap feature extraction enables new steering approaches
